rsvp_marketing_hero_tagline: Let customers book themselves. Reservations, flexible pricing, payments, and reminders—automated and always-on.
rsvp_marketing_feature_booking_descripti: Customers pick date, time, facility, and optional staff—fully online. Set minimum notice and maximum advance booking windows per facility.
rsvp_marketing_feature_pricing_descripti: Set a base rate per facility, then layer weekday/weekend and time-of-day rules. Peak pricing applies automatically—no manual adjustments needed.
rsvp_marketing_feature_notifications_des: Confirmation goes out at booking; a reminder fires before the appointment. Fewer no-shows, zero manual follow-up for your team.
rsvp_marketing_feature_calendar_descript: Week-view calendar for staff. One click to confirm, seat, mark no-show, or complete. Tags, blacklists, and standby waitlist supported.
rsvp_marketing_feature_integrations_desc: Enable Reserve with Google so customers book from Google Search and Maps. Sync to Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and LINE booking flows.
rsvp_marketing_feature_policies_descript: Set a free-cancel window (e.g. cancel 24 h before for free). Independent hours per store and facility. Single-slot mode for one-on-one services.
rsvp_marketing_feature_payment_descripti: Optional prepayment—full or partial deposit. Checkout via Stripe, LINE Pay, loyalty credit, or cash. Toggle price visibility per customer.
rsvp_marketing_use_cases_subtitle: Built for everyone—from solo studios to multi-location venues.
rsvp_marketing_use_case_studio_body: Let clients book sessions, classes, or consultations online. Collect deposits automatically, send reminders, and focus on coaching—not scheduling.
rsvp_marketing_use_case_venue_body: Show live availability, accept online payments, and eliminate back-and-forth calls. Dynamic pricing fills off-peak slots while maximising peak revenue.
rsvp_marketing_use_case_restaurant_body: Handle high-demand holidays without chaos. Guests pre-select meals and rooms at booking—they arrive ready, you’re prepared, wait time drops.
rsvp_marketing_use_case_beauty_body: Clients choose their stylist, service, and time slot independently. Stop managing the booking phone and see your whole day at a glance.
rsvp_marketing_use_case_clinic_body: Offer time-slotted online registration. Appointment confirmations and pre-visit reminders go out automatically—shorter wait rooms, smoother clinic flow.
waitlist_marketing_hero_tagline: No extra hardware. No paper lists. Guests scan, join the queue, walk away, and get notified the moment their turn arrives.
waitlist_marketing_hero_typewriter_2: scan, queue, walk away—get notified when it’s your turn.
waitlist_marketing_features_heading: Walking in shouldn’t mean standing around
waitlist_marketing_feature_smarter_realt: Guests cancel or keep their spot while you see the list update instantly—fewer empty slots and less wasted staff time.
waitlist_marketing_feature_line_integrat: Scan a QR code and join the queue in LINE. No download, no signup—guests are in the system in under 30 seconds.
waitlist_marketing_feature_flexible_queu: Guests don’t have to stand at the entrance. They step away freely and get a push alert when it’s their turn—ideal for restaurants, clinics, and more.
waitlist_marketing_feature_party_size_se: Configurable group sizes (e.g. 2–8) let you plan tables before guests even arrive, cutting on-the-spot shuffling.
waitlist_marketing_feature_line_notify_c: LINE pushes the moment their number is called. Guests never miss their spot—smoother service, shorter perceived waits.
waitlist_marketing_feature_cloud_admin_s: Run everything from a browser tab—no kiosks, no proprietary devices. Staff are up and running in minutes.
waitlist_marketing_customer_step_1_descr: No app download or account needed
waitlist_marketing_customer_step_2_title: Pick party size and join the queue
waitlist_marketing_customer_step_2_descr: Get a number instantly; see how many groups are ahead
waitlist_marketing_customer_step_3_descr: No need to hover near the door
waitlist_marketing_customer_step_4_title: Head back in and get seated
waitlist_marketing_customer_step_4_descr: From scan to seat—seamless from start to finish
waitlist_marketing_merchant_step_1_title: View the live waitlist in admin
waitlist_marketing_merchant_step_1_descr: Group count, party sizes, and wait time at a glance
waitlist_marketing_merchant_step_2_title: Tap to call the next group
waitlist_marketing_merchant_step_4_title: Mark as seated to close the entry
waitlist_marketing_use_cases_subtitle: Any walk-in wait scenario—replace the clipboard and kiosk with a QR code.
waitlist_marketing_use_case_restaurant_b: Ditch the paper list on busy weekends. Guests scan, queue from anywhere nearby, and get a LINE notification when their table is ready—no hovering required.
waitlist_marketing_use_case_clinic_body: Replace a crowded waiting room with a virtual queue. Patients see their position in line and receive an alert when it’s their turn—more comfortable for everyone.
waitlist_marketing_use_case_gov_body: Paperless ticketing from a QR code. One admin screen replaces an entire kiosk setup—cuts hardware costs and keeps the queue moving.
waitlist_marketing_use_case_event_body: Control capacity for high-demand experiences. Attendees scan to claim a spot and enter when called—smoother crowd flow, better experience.
waitlist_marketing_cta_heading: Turn on cloud waitlist for your store
cost_section_subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready. No contracts, cancel any time.
cost_section_footer: All plans include cloud waitlist and reservations. Upgrade or downgrade instantly—no penalties.
cost_plan_basic_tagline: Zero upfront cost—pay only when you earn
order_marketing_hero_typewriter_2: QR ordering, online payments—run smoother from day one.
order_marketing_hero_tagline: No upfront cost, no proprietary hardware. Start taking orders from any phone or tablet.
order_marketing_description_heading: QR ordering that keeps every table moving
order_marketing_description_body: Guests scan, order, and pay. The kitchen sees it instantly. Inventory updates itself. Your daily report is always ready. One dashboard, zero paper.
order_marketing_feature_qrcode_descripti: Guests scan the table QR and order in their browser. No download, no login—done in under 30 seconds.
order_marketing_feature_payment_descript: LINE Pay, credit card, stored value, cash—all in one checkout. Set pre-pay or post-meal billing per store.
order_marketing_feature_inventory_descri: Items auto-hide when stock runs out. Guests only see what's available—no more 'sorry, sold out' after ordering.
order_marketing_feature_kitchen_descript: Orders appear on the kitchen tablet the moment they're placed. Tap to mark served—no paper tickets, no shouting across the pass.
order_marketing_feature_reports_descript: Daily, weekly, monthly revenue. Top-selling items, peak-hour heatmaps, per-table averages. Data-driven decisions—not guesswork.
order_marketing_feature_staff_order_desc: Self-service QR, staff tablet ordering, pre-order while waiting, takeaway pickup—all in one system, switch modes as needed.
order_marketing_use_cases_subtitle: From street food stalls to multi-location chains—any food and beverage business.
order_marketing_use_case_dine_in_body: Guests scan the table QR and order themselves. The kitchen gets it instantly—no running orders, no paper tickets, faster table turns.
order_marketing_use_case_beverage_body: Customers pre-order on the way, specify sweetness and ice, pick a time. No queue at the door during rush hour—drinks are ready on arrival.
order_marketing_use_case_takeaway_body: Online pre-orders with scheduled pickup. No phone calls to confirm, no crowded counter—customers arrive and their order is waiting.
order_marketing_use_case_hotpot_body: Guests reorder ingredients any time by scanning the table QR. One bill at the end—no staff rushing to confirm add-ons, no missed items.
order_marketing_use_case_fine_dining_bod: Staff use tablets to take orders tableside, explain daily specials, and assist guests who prefer a personal touch—without slowing down service.
